name: Kannada
notes: Janya of Shankarabharanam (29th melakarta, mela 29); upanga vakra-sampurna raga; arohana: S R2 G3 M1 P M1 D2 N3 S, avarohana: S N3 S D2 P M1 G3 M1 G3 M1 R2 S; heavily vakra in both ascent and descent; associated with Bharatanatyam jatisvarams and Dikshitar's Sri Matrubhutam; distinct from kaanada (mela 22) in both Gandhara (G3 here vs G2) and Nishada (N3 here vs N2), and in being upanga (no anya svara)
